title: The Story of Valerian
script: In ancient Rome a weary man could not sleep by candlelight. Healers gave him valerian root to calm his restless mind. By dawn the herb eased him into deep and peaceful sleep.

title: Chamomile Through History
script: Ancient Egyptians honored chamomile as a gift of the sun. Medieval monks grew it in quiet stone gardens. Today it calms millions of people before sleep.
